steps.t: The decaying columns can be found in the Orc-camps at Fehem-dûm and Hadâd-dûm, east of Jazârgund. Hamall noticed several decaying columns within the n…
Hamall is at Jazârgund, west of Fehem-dûm and Hadâd-dûm. Hamall should know that none of the columns collapsed, and the cavern did not collapse.
